steps.title: Read the adaptation problem
steps.content: The passage says Fujita's short story had little dialogue, while theater relies on dialogue. The underlined sentence explains how she solved that problem by creating situations where characters speak their thoughts aloud.

steps.title: Match the sentence's function
steps.content: B invents influence on later playwrights. C compares the fame of the story and play, and D discusses casting, none of which appears in the sentence. The answer is A.
